success.title: Message Sent!
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.

q1.question: How long does a typical project take?
q1.answer: Project timelines vary based on complexity. A landing page takes 1-2 weeks, while a full e-commerce site takes 4-6 weeks.

q2.question: What is your pricing model?
q2.answer: Pricing depends on project scope and requirements. After our initial consultation, I provide a detailed quote with milestones.

q3.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
q3.answer: Yes! All projects include a warranty period, and I offer maintenance packages for ongoing updates and support.

q4.question: Can you work with my existing design?
q4.answer: Absolutely! I can work with your designs or create new ones from scratch based on your brand guidelines.
